privileged_info_summary: The target configuration file is synthetically created at /var/ossec/etc/critical_app.conf inside the wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 container. The verifier strictly checks that the ossec.conf file is configured to monitor this file with the report_changes="yes" and realtime="yes" attributes enabled, and that a FIM alert with a diff payload is successfully generated after modifying the file.
